race.comment: FLOR PALIDA (10) ran well on debut last start to finish third over 1200m at this track in a tougher race. Likely improver so a big run is anticipated. DOLLAR TREE (9) is still a maiden after nine starts. Could only manage to finish fourth last time out over 1200m at this track following a minor placing at this track over 1000m the run prior. Cannot be left out of calculations. MIRADA DISTINTA (1) ran a fair race on debut last time out, beaten 4 lengths into sixth over 1200m at this track on April 12. Should be competitive. CEST CHIC (11) is a two-year-old filly on debut from the stable of Cesar Orellana Rodriguez Julio. By Tacitus from Cabin Street. Top-three chance.
